targets.rawSql: SELECT rejection_reason, signal_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM decision_log WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND outcome = 'rejected' AND rejection_reason IS NOT NULL GROUP BY rejection_reason, signal_type ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT $__timeGroup(created_at, '15m') AS time, rejection_reason, COUNT(*) AS count FROM decision_log WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND outcome = 'rejected' GROUP BY 1, rejection_reason ORDER BY 1

SELECT width_bucket(edge, 0, 0.20, 20) AS bucket, ROUND(((width_bucket(edge, 0, 0.20, 20) - 1) * 0.01)::numeric, 2) AS edge_range, COUNT(*) AS count FROM decision_log WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND outcome = 'rejected' AND rejection_reason = 'edge_below_minimum' AND edge IS NOT NULL GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket

SELECT $__timeGroup(created_at, '5m') AS time, AVG(model_prob) AS avg_model_prob, AVG(market_price) AS avg_market_price FROM decision_log WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND model_prob IS NOT NULL AND market_price IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT created_at, ticker, signal_type, source, outcome, rejection_reason, ROUND(model_prob::numeric, 3) AS model_prob, ROUND(market_price::numeric, 3) AS mkt_price, ROUND(edge::numeric, 4) AS edge, ROUND(adjusted_edge::numeric, 4) AS adj_edge, direction, ROUND(confidence::numeric, 2) AS confidence, ROUND(minutes_remaining::numeric, 1) AS mins_left, ROUND(micro_total::numeric, 4) AS micro FROM decision_log WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 200
